Kadir Has University

Electrical and Electronics Engineering

Kadir Has University Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering carries out world-class education and research activities in areas such as communication technologies, microwave systems, neural networks, deep learning, advanced signal processing and power electronics. The department offers education in English, is accredited by MÜDEK and has EUR-ACE labelling. Students gain hands-on experience in laboratories such as Telecommunications, Electronics, Microprocessors, Computer Networks and Electrical Machines. In addition, international opportunities such as double major, minor and Erasmus+ are offered. The department has research collaborations with leading universities in the USA, China and Europe.
